text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Hmm? What's that gesture mean?<n>You cold?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Wait, got it! Hot springs! You wanna<n>try a
Japanese-style bath, yeah?!

text_block_list.name: Foreigner
text_block_list.text: [Foreign Language]

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
On a busy street, I catch sight of<n>Tamamo Cross
and Oguri Cap<n>attempting to communicate with a<n>
tourist from overseas.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
No dice... I can't understand a thing,<n>'sides that
he's stressed out.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
He looks to be in a hurry. Do you<n>think it's
something urgent?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Rather, don'tcha think he's gettin'<n>kinda pale?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Rumble...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: That's it! He's hungry!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Nah! He's lookin' for the toilet!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Which makes this an emergency!<n>Hey, you
there—come help out!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: C'mon, mister! Follow me!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: The closest toilet is over at the park!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Comin' through! Thanks for yer<n>cooperation!

text_block_list.name: Foreigner
text_block_list.text: [Foreign Language]

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! He left lookin' a lot happier,<n>huh?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
He must have been thanking us. It's<n>a good
thing we avoided disaster.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Still, I'm surprised you recognized he<n>needed the
toilet.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I was as lost as you were at the start,<n>but when
his tummy rumbled and he<n>went pale, it clicked!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Plus, since I've always got you<n>around, I know
what "hungry" looks<n>like—and that wasn't it!
choice_data_list: You never hesitate to help others, huh?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Plus, since I've always got you<n>around, I know
what "hungry" looks<n>like—an' he wasn't it!
choice_data_list: You never hesitate to help others, huh?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
C-c'mon! I'm just tryin' to get on<n>the director's
good side!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: You're getting embarrassed.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Oguri! You promised to stop pointin'<n>that out!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hmm? I don't remember making that<n>promise.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: You promise promised!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Ah, whatever. Nothin' wrong with<n>bein' friendly,
yeah?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
And if language gets in the way, I'll<n>use vibes!
That's just how I roll!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Th-thanks! Y'know, it's kinda<n>embarrassin' to
be told so straight!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
You're right, she's very kind. She<n>never
hesitates to recommend the<n>best places for
Kansai cuisine or even<n>just spots where you can
eat til you<n>drop!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Why're your examples all 'bout<n>food?!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Grrrowl...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: That you, Oguri? Gettin' hungry, huh?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
All this talk about food makes me<n>want to go to
one of those<n>eat-till-you-drop places again...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Then let's grab a bite! Lunch never<n>tastes better
than it does after doin' a<n>good deed!
